name: Patch Compose Env Value
description: Patches a single key in the `environment:` block of an already-deployed docker-compose.yml (in the LXC volume directory) and triggers `docker compose up -d`. Used by refresh-stack task. Does not re-render the compose file — only replaces the value of the specified env key.

parameters.name: LXC Container ID
parameters.description: LXC container ID whose compose file is patched.

parameters.name: Hostname
parameters.description: Container hostname (used to locate volume directory).

parameters.name: Env Key in docker-compose.yml
parameters.description: The environment key to set (e.g. CF_API_TOKEN).

parameters.name: New Value
parameters.description: New value for the env key.
